description: CompositionPair of black wrist bands made of 80% cotton, 16% nylon and 4% lycra, that have iconic three stripes, brand name embroidered on it and NBA brand badge appliqued on itFittingComfortWash careWash dark colours separatelyWash below 40 degree cDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm ironDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print/trims/logoMade of cotton and lycra mix fabric, these comfy adidas wristbands are ideal for everyday workouts. The soft and broad bands give much needed reinforcement to the wrists and help you improve your performance.
